since_last: 9% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -0.71%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 9% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.13% · Gold +0.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 9% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -0.71%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -0.71%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.02%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +1.92%, SO +1.08%, ETR +0.90%, PEG +0.78%, LEU +0.63%. Laggards: ISRG -11.02%, AMAT -4.32%, CEVA -3.95%, SPCX -3.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.90% at $126.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
